risks.message: U2 (mcu) has no nearby decoupling capacitor
risks.recommendation: Place a decoupling capacitor close to the device power pin and on the relevant supply net.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Place a 0.1uF decoupling capacitor close to the IC power pin, ideally within the configured threshold of 4.0.

risks.message: U2 may have poor power delivery because nearest regulator U1 is 85.00 units away
risks.recommendation: Move the regulator closer to the load or improve the power delivery path with lower-impedance routing.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Move the regulator closer to the load or reduce the power path length from its current distance of 85.0. Also consider wider copper or a lower-impedance distribution path.

risks.message: Power net VIN has excessive routed length (85.00 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce power path length or improve distribution topology to lower impedance and voltage drop risk.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Shorten the power route and improve placement to reduce the current routed length of 85.0.

risks.message: Power net VIN uses a narrow trace width (0.15)
risks.recommendation: Increase power trace width to reduce resistance, heating, and voltage drop.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Increase the power trace width from 0.15 to at least 0.5 or more, depending on current demand.

risks.message: Net CTRL contains a very narrow trace (0.10)
risks.recommendation: Review manufacturability limits and increase trace width if the design rules require it.

explanation.impact: Reduced yield or board failure risk

fix_suggestion.fix: Increase the narrow trace width from 0.1 to at least 0.15, subject to board-space and fabrication constraints.

suggested_actions: Increase trace width if routing space allows.
Review whether this narrow section is intentional.

executive_summary.headline: Board needs focused engineering review
executive_summary.summary: This board shows high design risk. The main risk concentration is in power integrity. The highest-priority issue is U2 may have poor power delivery because nearest regulator U1 is 85.00 units away. The current design snapshot includes 2 components and 3 nets. The board is likely functional at a prototype level, but the highlighted issues should be addressed before stronger production confidence.
